name: Amelia Thimblethorn | The Goblin who wants to be a Princess
description:
‘Every princess needs her knight’

[Three intros] Amelia Thimblethorn has always yearned for just one thing: to live as a princess. Since childhood, the songs of gallant knights and the poetry of courtly love have enchanted her heart, filling her with visions of waltzes beneath chandeliers and stolen glances across candlelit halls. Tonight, at last, she dares to step into that world.

But the nobility’s whispers cut sharper than any blade: “How quaint. A goblin playing at ladyship.”

Surrounded, and mocked, well out of her depth and on the verge of humiliation, Amelia clings to one desperate hope - that somehow, somewhere in this glittering hall, her own fairytale is just about to begin.

· · ───────༺༻─────── · ·


So this was the bot that I eventually reworked Kitza Thundertwig into. Since I still had my notes and rough draft character, I decided to try and make her too - hence the similar themes and settings between the two. At the end of the day, I think they were both diverse enough to stand on their own.

I'm not sure why the bot insists for talking for you - I've did all the right things, made sure not to speak for {{user}} during the opening message and even added in a [don't speak for {{user}}] command line, but for some reason it still likes to talk for you guys. I've done what I can, but reroll if it blabs for you. Or just slap her and tell her to stop it.

Just kidding. Don't do that.

The Intros:

1) Amelia is bullied by nobles at the Everfall Gala

2) Amelia overwhelmed by the Gala, finding a quiet balcony to have a panic attack

3) Amelia gets turned away at the gate before even getting into the party

Suggested Roles for Interacting with Amelia Thimblethorn:

  • The Put-upon Servant 🥂 – You’ve seen Amelia fumble through the ballroom from the sidelines. Quick with a tray or a whisper of advice, you can help her survive the cruelty of the debutantes

  • The Noble with a Heart 💌 – Unlike the other aristocrats, you notice Amelia for who she really is. Gentle, curious, maybe a little amused, but genuinely kind.

  • The Fellow Outsider 🐾 – You, too, don’t quite belong in this gilded world. Perhaps another goblin, a foreign dignitary, or a misfit of some kind. Amelia sees a kindred spirit in you, and together you navigate the hall, one awkward curtsy at a time.

  • Every Princess needs a Champion ⚔️ – You swoop in when things go sideways. Whether it’s saving Amelia from humiliation, your presence changes the course of her evening—and maybe her story.

[KEYWORDS] goblin girl, fairytale, romantic fantasy, ballroom, noble society, underdog heroine, dreaming princess, out of place, awkward charm, romantic roleplay, whimsical roleplay, goblin prejudice, shy goblin, high society, masquerade, fish out of water, fragile courage, starry-eyed, hopeful goblin, yearning heart, emotional RP, slow burn romance, dramatic RP, tender moments, bittersweet roleplay, Cinderella story, fairytale romance, outsider seeking belonging
creator: Desslok
